allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST https://api.dev.entur.io/journey-planner/v3/graphql -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'ET-Client-Name: entur-mcp-test' -d '{"query":"{ __type\(name: \\"Quay\\"\) { fields { name } } }"}')
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(sorted\([f['name'] for f in d['data']['__type']['fields']]\)\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://api.dev.entur.io/journey-planner/v3/graphql" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "ET-Client-Name: entur-mcp-test" -d '{"query":"{ __type\(name: \\"PointsOnLink\\"\) { fields { name } } }"}')
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); t=d['data']['__type']; print\(sorted\([f['name'] for f in t['fields']]\) if t else 'type not found'\)")
